title: Enforcement of this Part through court action
doc_html:
§115. Enforcement of this Part through court action

            The assistant secretary may institute any action in the courts necessary to enforce compliance with any provisions of this Part or with any rule, subpoena, or order of the assistant secretary made pursuant to the provisions of this Part. In addition to any other remedy, the assistant secretary may apply to the appropriate district court for injunctive relief.

            Acts 1981, No. 732, §1.
